description: Developed intelligent road and traffic situation detection technology using mobile infrastructure image sensors (crack severity detection).
Worked on integrated software framework for NPU-based computation of time-series big-data deep learning applications.
Contributed to C-ITS large-scale data processing algorithms (majority coder: 29/35 modules).
Teaching assistant for the graduate-level Scientific Writing course.
Worked on pedestrian trajectory prediction and surrogate safety measures at non-signalized intersections.
Built deep learning models for traffic speed prediction under sparse data conditions.
Published and presented related work at TRB, T-ITS, and TRIP venues.
